When Jupiter transits Pisces and Aries in his 3rd round, the native will
get ill-fame through women folk near about bis 25-27th year. He will get
married between 30-31 when Saturn transits Venus. With Ketu in the 12th and
Venus in the second to Mars, the native will have three sisters. As Mars has
Jupiter'~ aspect, he will have 4-5 brothers too. Two of them will come up well.
He will live an ordinary life up to 70 years.
